## Watershed Asset Management initiates new position in Intel

No actionable signal; routine new institutional position in INTC does not change the Intel foundry or PC-cycle thesis.

- Watershed Asset Management disclosed a new INTC investment; no position size stated in the headline.
- Low classifier confidence; routine institutional initiation with no thesis or catalyst disclosed.
- Same firm (Watershed) also disclosed a LITE position today, suggesting routine 13F reporting cycle.
- No Intel-specific catalyst or turnaround signal implied.
